description: Bankrate is a consumer financial information and comparison platform that publishes rates, reviews, calculators, and guidance for products like mortgages, savings accounts, credit cards, and home equity loans. It connects consumers with financial product providers but is not itself a bank or lender.
summary: Bankrate exposes a public MCP server at `https://bankrate-openai-mcp.bankrate.com/mcp`; no public HTTP APIs, GraphQL APIs, or CLIs were found for developers on `bankrate.com`.
